prompt: Find events on my calendar that match the keyword 'dentist'. Search all dates — do not add any date filters.

function.name: search_calendar_events
function.description: Search calendar events by keyword. Dates are optional filters.

query.description: Keyword to search event titles and descriptions.

start_date.description: Earliest date to include, format YYYY-MM-DD.

end_date.description: Latest date to include, format YYYY-MM-DD.

notes: Tests a single calendar search with only the required argument; adding optional date filters fails the run.
